description_long: This is a large, white pickup truck with a four-door crew cab and an extended cargo bed at the rear. The vehicle features prominent black wheels with rugged tires, chrome accents on the front grille, and side mirrors. The front end displays a recognizable blue oval badge, indicating a Ford make, and the headlights are rectangular with a modern design. The cargo bed is open and spacious, suitable for transporting goods or equipment, and the rear includes a visible tow hitch. The windows are tinted black, and the body panels are smooth with subtle contour lines. The overall build is robust, designed for both utility and passenger comfort in urban or suburban environments.
description: A large, white four-door Ford pickup truck with a spacious cargo bed, chrome accents, and rugged black wheels. The design is robust and modern, suitable for both utility and passenger use.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the open cargo bed, tailgate, taillights, and tow hitch.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four-door crew cab, extended cargo bed, and black wheels.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the chrome grille, blue Ford badge, headlights, and side mirrors.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the crew cab, cargo bed, and wheel details.
